question: How many papers are in the corpus?
Which paper in the corpus is cited by the most other papers in the corpus?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (:Paper)-[:CITES]->(p:Paper) RETURN p.title AS answer, count(*) AS n ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which concept is discussed by the most papers?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:DISCUSSES]->(c:Concept) RETURN c.name AS answer, count(p) AS n ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the most recent paper in the corpus?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (p:Paper) RETURN p.title AS answer ORDER BY coalesce(p.year,0) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many theorems (as opposed to lemmas or propositions) have been extracted across the corpus?
which papers discuss brownian motion?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:DISCUSSES]->(c:Concept) WHERE toLower(c.name) = 'brownian motion' RETURN collect(p.title) AS answer

question: Pick any theorem that depends on at least one other result and name what it depends on.
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (r:Result)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(d:Result) RETURN r.name AS theorem, collect(d.name) AS answer LIMIT 1

question: Which paper in the corpus won a Nobel prize?
ground_truth_cypher: RETURN 'This information is not in the corpus' AS answer

question: What is the current price of NVDA stock?
ground_truth_cypher: RETURN 'Out of scope for this corpus' AS answer

question: Which author has the most papers in the corpus?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(:Paper) RETURN a.name AS answer, count(*) AS n ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the definition of Brownian motion?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (d:Definition)-[:DEFINES]->(c:Concept) WHERE toLower(c.name)=toLower('Brownian motion') RETURN collect(d.statement)[..3] AS answer

question: What is the definition of Stochastic Differential Equation?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (d:Definition)-[:DEFINES]->(c:Concept) WHERE toLower(c.name)=toLower('Stochastic Differential Equation') RETURN collect(d.statement)[..3] AS answer

question: What is the definition of Gaussian distribution?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (d:Definition)-[:DEFINES]->(c:Concept) WHERE toLower(c.name)=toLower('Gaussian distribution') RETURN collect(d.statement)[..3] AS answer

question: Which papers discuss both Brownian motion and Stochastic Differential Equation?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:DISCUSSES]->(a:Concept), (p)-[:DISCUSSES]->(b:Concept) WHERE toLower(a.name)=toLower('Brownian motion') AND toLower(b.name)=toLower('Stochastic Differential Equation') RETURN collect(p.title) AS answer

question: Which papers discuss both Brownian motion and Gaussian distribution?
ground_truth_cypher: MATCH (p:Paper)-[:DISCUSSES]->(a:Concept), (p)-[:DISCUSSES]->(b:Concept) WHERE toLower(a.name)=toLower('Brownian motion') AND toLower(b.name)=toLower('Gaussian distribution') RETURN collect(p.title) AS answer
